rationale: Educ. Code §25.001(b)(10) cross-references the definition of 'residence homestead' in Tax Code §11.13(j), not the exemption amount in §11.13(b). Changing the dollar amount of the exemption does not alter the definition or affect admission eligibility.
quote: the person and either parent of the person reside in a residence homestead, as defined by Section 11.13(j), Tax Code, that is located on a parcel of property any part of which is located in the school district.
_note: No conflict: proposed change to §11.13(b) exemption amount does not affect §11.13(j) definition referenced by this rule.
